en_title: Microsoft Pulls Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater 1+2 From July 2026 Xbox Game Pass Lineup Without Explanation
cn_title: 微软撤下《托尼·霍克职业滑板1+2》XBOX Game Pass阵容
subtitle: 官方未解释临时撤档原因
opus_summary: 微软未作解释便将《托尼·霍克职业滑板1+2》从7月XBOX Game Pass阵容撤下。外界猜测可能与大量授权音乐有关，但微软拥有该作发行控制权。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has pulled Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater 1+2 from July 2026 Xbox Game Pass lineup, without offering an explanation.
paragraphs.cn: 微软已将《托尼·霍克职业滑板1+2》从2026年7月XBOX Game Pass阵容中撤下，且未作解释。

paragraphs.en: Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater 1 + 2 was due to hit Game Pass Ultimate, Game Pass Premium, and PC Game Pass on July 21, but a note added to the Game Pass post on Xbox Wire confirms its removal from the lineup. It reads:
paragraphs.cn: 《托尼·霍克职业滑板1+2》原定7月21日加入Game Pass Ultimate、Game Pass Premium和PC Game Pass，但XBOX Wire的Game Pass文章新增一则说明，确认该作已从阵容中移除。说明写道：

paragraphs.en: “Editor’s Note (7/13): We’ve removed Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater 1+2 from the list of titles coming soon to Game Pass.”
paragraphs.cn: 「编者注（7月13日）：我们已将《托尼·霍克职业滑板1+2》从即将加入Game Pass的游戏名单中移除。」

paragraphs.en: It’s worth noting that Microsoft owns Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater 1+2 via its $69 billion acquisition of Activision Blizzard, so it’s in complete control of publishing the title. Indeed, Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater 3+4 was added to Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass this time last year, and Game Pass premium just last month.
paragraphs.cn: 值得注意的是，微软通过以690亿美元(约合人民币4678亿元)收购动视暴雪而拥有《托尼·霍克职业滑板1+2》，因此完全掌握该作的发行权。事实上，《托尼·霍克职业滑板3+4》去年此时已加入Game Pass Ultimate和PC Game Pass，并在上个月加入Game Pass Premium。

paragraphs.en: It has been suggested that there may be a licensing issue preventing the music-heavy game from being released on Game Pass now, nearly six years after it came out. You’d like to think Microsoft or Activision would have been aware of that before announcing it as coming to Game Pass later this month, though.
paragraphs.cn: 有人猜测，这款大量使用音乐的游戏发售近6年后，可能因授权问题无法在此时加入Game Pass。不过，人们理应认为微软或动视会在宣布它于本月晚些时候上线Game Pass前就意识到这一问题。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft is of course in the process of resetting Xbox, which saw 1,600 staff cut last week and four studios exit the business. Another 1,600 staff will go over the course of the rest of this financial year, leaving remaining staff facing an anxious wait to find out if they're next on the chopping block. Microsoft has said it will now focus on its biggest franchises, including Halo, The Elder Scrolls, and Fallout.
paragraphs.cn: 微软目前正在重整XBOX业务，上周裁掉1600名员工，并有4家工作室退出业务。本财年余下时间还将再裁1600人，留下的员工只能焦虑等待自己是否会成为下一批。微软表示今后将专注于旗下最大系列，包括《光环》《上古卷轴》和《辐射》。

paragraphs.en: Here’s the revised Xbox Game Pass lineup for the rest of July 2026:
paragraphs.cn: 以下是调整后的2026年7月剩余时间XBOX Game Pass阵容：
